name: veogenie
description: Connect Codex to the locally installed VeoGenie desktop app through MCP with basic workflow guidance for nodes, inputs, video prompts, and shared voice routing.

interface.shortDescription: Use the local VeoGenie desktop app from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Adds MCP tools and lightweight agent guides for the locally installed VeoGenie desktop app. Codex can inspect pages, understand node roles, connect text, image, video, and voice inputs correctly, reuse one voice across multiple video nodes, write video prompts, and export generated media when the user enables the matching permission. The default configuration is read-only and connects through the app's installed veogenie-mcp.cmd launcher.
defaultPrompt: List VeoGenie pages and node counts.
Read the current VeoGenie media album.
Attach a user chat image to a VeoGenie image reference node.
Record VeoGenie feedback into project memory docs.
Route VeoGenie video frames, reference images, and voice inputs correctly.
Design a VeoGenie workflow with correct text, image, video, and voice ports.
Connect one VeoGenie voice node to multiple video nodes.
